title: piqueria glandulosa
intro: Piqueria glandulosa is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, commonly known as the bitterroot or glandular piqueria. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits associated with Piqueria glandulosa include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support immune function. Piqueria glandulosa can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often combined with other herbs in traditional herbal remedies.
